HistoryExtensionMethodsGetDataAsync Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Returns the history data for this method, as if there had been a request.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.History
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public static Task<EntityCollectionData> GetDataAsync(
	this IHistoryMethod method,
	IRequest request,
	IQueryCollection parameters,
	CancellationToken ct = null
)

Parameters

method
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.HistoryIHistoryMethod
request
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.HandlingIRequest
parameters
Type: IQueryCollection
ct (Optional)
Type: System.ThreadingCancellationToken

Return Value

Type: TaskEntityCollectionData

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type IHistoryMethod. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
